title: Dealer Disclosure Scraper Input
description: Configure which dealers to scrape for fee disclosures and financing terms.

dealers.title: Dealers to Scrape
dealers.description: List of dealer names to scrape. Leave empty to scrape all dealers.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.description: Your OpenAI API key for GPT-powered disclosure parsing. Can also be set as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

pagesToSample.title: Pages to Sample Per Dealer
pagesToSample.description: Number of vehicle detail pages to scrape per dealer. More pages = more accurate but slower.
